title: ateleia gummifera
intro: Ateleia gummifera, also known as Ateleia, is a flowering plant in the Fabaceae family native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Ateleia gummifera include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and soothing skin irritations. Ateleia gummifera can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or ointment for topical application, and is often used in herbal remedies to support skin health and promote overall well-being.
